playlist_title: Blue Ridge Local Legends: From Porch to Stage

tracks.significance: The Deep Gap, NC pioneer of flat-picking.
tracks.senior_facility_activity: Heritage Storytelling: Discussing life in the 'Deep Gap' before the Parkway.

tracks.significance: Connecting Appalachian flat-picking to the Jam Band circuit.
tracks.senior_facility_activity: Instrument Clinic: Examining the 'Steel-String' guitar versus the traditional 'Gut-String' banjo.

tracks.significance: Revitalizing the Bluegrass/Old-Timey intersection for a global audience.
tracks.senior_facility_activity: Intergenerational Listening: Playing 'Rank Stranger' and comparing Billy's version to the 1950s Stanley Brothers original.

clogging_checklist.rhythm_tip: Focus on the 'Off-Beat' (the backbeat) provided by the Upright Bass.
